title: V2X-Aware Trajectory Prediction for Software-Defined Vehicles
abstract: We propose a V2X-aware trajectory prediction model tailored for software-defined vehicle (SDV) platforms, incorporating inter-vehicle communication signals into motion forecasting for improved safety margins.

title: BEV-Fusion++: Occupancy Prediction for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
abstract: We present a sensor fusion architecture combining camera and LiDAR into a unified bird's-eye-view (BEV) representation for occupancy prediction and trajectory forecasting in end-to-end autonomous driving pipelines.

title: MAPPO-CT: Cooperative Transport with Multi-Agent PPO under Decentralized Control
abstract: We propose a MAPPO-based framework for cooperative transport of large objects by multiple mobile robots under a Dec-POMDP formulation. Our CTDE approach enables decentralized execution while training with centralized critics, achieving robust coordination without explicit communication.
memo: MAPPOの報酬設計が参考になる。関連研究として要チェック。

title: Decentralized Multi-Robot Coordination for Warehouse Transport via Graph Attention
abstract: This paper introduces a graph attention network for scalable decentralized coordination among heterogeneous robot teams performing cooperative transport tasks in dynamic warehouse environments.

title: Scaling Laws for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning in Dec-POMDPs
abstract: We study empirical scaling laws for MARL algorithms including MAPPO and QMIX across a range of Dec-POMDP benchmarks, providing guidance for compute-optimal training of cooperative agent teams.
memo: BenchMARLでの再現実験に使えそう
